title: Kong routes /auth/v1/health to GoTrue health endpoint
description: GET /auth/v1/health through Kong. If Kong's auth route is configured correctly with strip_path: true, this request reaches GoTrue at /health and returns version info. This is the simplest possible validation that the auth route works.
preconditions: Kong routes /auth/v1 to GoTrue with strip_path: true
author: dlesieur
notes: Simpler than GW-001 (which uses /auth/health without versioned path). This test uses the Supabase-standard /auth/v1/ prefix. Set active once Kong is routing auth correctly.
